name: The Discovery
effect: Surface a discovery. This card is considered insightful.

clauses.name: ASSUMPTION CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If no discovery session was conducted: All findings are considered pre-populated.

clauses.name: CONFIDENCE OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If the client nods: The assumptions are considered validated.

clauses.name: FORGETFULNESS CLAUSE
clauses.rule: Next turn: No one remembers that no one asked any questions.
